# Okahu MCP Context

For Okahu MCP tool calls related to traces, spans, workflows, or evaluations, use the identifiers from Active selection below as tool arguments where applicable. If a needed id is missing or shown as ? ask the user — don’t guess. Ignore this file for unrelated queries.

## Active selection

_No active selection. Ask the user which tenant or workflow they want to query._
